strategy.thesis: Narrative is confirmed and gaining mainstream traction. Ride the momentum with tight risk management.
strategy.entry_rule: Enter when velocity_score 35-60 AND both volume AND price trending up AND global_regime != BTC_DOMINANCE
strategy.entry_trigger: Buy on pullback to 10-day moving average or volume confirmation
strategy.position_size: 3-5% of portfolio per narrative (medium risk, confirmed trend)
strategy.exit_rule_profit: Exit 33% at +25%, 33% at +50%, trail stop on final 33%
strategy.exit_rule_time: Exit if volume_change_24h drops below 10% for 3 consecutive days
strategy.notes: Reduce position size by 50% if BTC_DOMINANCE regime detected

strategy.thesis: Narrative attention is accelerating faster than price. Accumulate before mainstream discovery.
strategy.entry_rule: Enter when velocity_score > 60 AND volume_change_24h > 100% AND avg_price_change_24h < 15%
strategy.entry_trigger: Buy on next daily open after signal confirmation
strategy.position_size: 2-4% of portfolio per narrative (high risk, early stage)
strategy.position_size_adjustment: REDUCE position size by 30% due to BTC dominance headwind

strategy.notes: Split entry into 3 tranches over 48 hours to reduce timing risk
